title: Making plurals
objectives: Form plurals of regular nouns and adjectives
Handle words ending in -z and stressed vowels
grammar_notes: Word ends in a vowel → add -s: libro → libros.
Word ends in a consonant → add -es: ciudad → ciudades.
Word ends in -z → change to -ces: lápiz → lápices, vez → veces.
Articles and adjectives pluralize too: el libro rojo → los libros rojos.
example_phrases: Tengo dos libros y tres lápices.
